name: Monterrey
author: rslurry
description: Combined result of INEGI's DENUE, CE, CPV, and ENOE data.  Covers from Montemorelos in the southeast to Hidalgo in the northwest.  Includes demand for MTY and NTR airports; ITESM, TecMilenio, U-ERRE, UMM, CEDIM, CEU, UDELN, UIN, UNICA, UDEM, UANL, ITNL, UPG, UTSC, UTGME, UTC, and UM universities; Cuarta Region Militar in Monterrey and Campo Militar 7-A in Apodaca military bases; and Macroplaza, Paseo Santa Lucia, Barrio Antiguo, Museo de Historia Mexicana, Museo MARCO, Cintermax, Fundidora Park, Cerro del Obispado, Grutas de Garcia, Arena Monterrey,  and Mercado Juarez.
data_source: INEGI's DENUE, CE, CPV, and ENUE
